hero.eyebrow: One User Platform for Every Website
hero.title: Private. Secure. Consent-Driven.
hero.description: NoIdMe delivers every user-related capability your website needs in one control layer, from sign-in and consent to profile preferences, memberships, and purchase-linked experiences.

systemNodes.title: Identity Core
systemNodes.description: Passkey-first authentication with OTP, password, social, SSO, and biometric-ready fallback orchestration.

systemNodes.title: Consent Engine
systemNodes.description: Purpose-driven consent policies across privacy, cookies, communication preferences, and regional mandates.

systemNodes.title: Profile Vault
systemNodes.description: Unified user profile for addresses, orders, memberships, shopping lists, and channel-level personalization.

impact.title: Promising Impact Snapshot
impact.description: NoIdMe improves conversion, customer trust, and compliance readiness through connected identity and consent workflows.

platform.title: Identity Management
platform.description: Deliver secure authentication and account management journeys for every website in your portfolio.
platform.note: Built for high-volume traffic, multi-brand portfolios, and strict governance controls.
features: OTP, password, and social login fallback
Unified user profile and account controls

modules.title: Authentication Studio
modules.description: Visual orchestration for passkeys, OTP, SSO, and fallback auth journeys without duplicated logic.

modules.title: Consent Ledger
modules.description: Immutable timeline of consent decisions by purpose, region, and channel for compliance audits.

modules.title: Profile Experience API
modules.description: Composable APIs for saved addresses, cards, preferences, memberships, and purchase-linked profile states.

modules.title: Policy Engine
modules.description: Rule-based governance for age checks, retention policies, and jurisdiction-specific privacy obligations.

modules.title: Identity Intelligence
modules.description: Suspicious login detection signals including impossible travel and unusual session behavior analysis.

modules.title: Partner Connect
modules.description: Prebuilt connectors to commerce, CRM, support, analytics, and customer engagement systems.

consent.title: Privacy and Consent Management
consent.description: Centralize consent policy, user rights workflows, and legal controls with transparent user experiences.
features: GDPR and CCPA-aligned user rights workflows
Privacy preference center and audit-ready logs

coverage.title: Mandate Coverage
coverage.description: Operate policy-ready compliance controls without slowing product teams.
items: Cookie opt-in and opt-out preference center
Data access and deletion request workflow
Audit export for legal and security teams

profiles.title: Unified User Profiles
profiles.description: Let customers manage identity, privacy, communication, commerce, and loyalty data from one trusted profile center.

integrations.title: Integration-Ready Architecture
integrations.description: Connect NoIdMe into your existing stack while hosting operational tools in dedicated internal apps.

items.name: E-commerce Platforms
items.detail: Synchronize sign-in, profile, and consent data into storefront, checkout, and post-purchase journeys.

items.name: CRM and CDP
items.detail: Activate consent-approved identity and preference attributes for segmentation and lifecycle engagement.

items.name: Analytics and Attribution
items.detail: Stream events with privacy-safe identity context and user-level consent enforcement.

items.name: Marketing Automation
items.detail: Respect communication preferences across campaigns, subscriptions, and audience orchestration.

items.name: Customer Support Systems
items.detail: Give agents governed profile visibility with policy-aware consent and request history.

items.name: Enterprise SSO Providers
items.detail: Bridge workforce and customer identity models with delegated auth and strong governance boundaries.

security.title: Security and Governance
security.leftDescription: Security-first identity architecture with strict access boundaries, encryption in transit and at rest, and accountable change controls.
security.rightDescription: Compliance-oriented workflows for consent records, privacy controls, and data subject requests to support enterprise governance requirements.

journey.title: Capture Identity
journey.description: Authenticate users with passkeys, OTP, SSO, social login, and secure fallback orchestration.

journey.title: Capture Consent
journey.description: Record purpose-based consent decisions with full legal context and immutable event traceability.

journey.title: Activate Profiles
journey.description: Publish approved profile and consent states to commerce, CRM, analytics, and engagement tools.

details.title: Expandable Information Details
details.description: Explore how NoIdMe handles core identity, consent, and profile operations in production scenarios.

items.title: How NoIdMe handles GDPR and CCPA requests
items.body: NoIdMe supports access, correction, export, and deletion workflows through policy-driven request automation.
points: Region-aware request routing and SLA timers
Automated identity verification before request fulfillment
Audit-ready export of request status and operator actions

items.title: How consent works across websites and channels
items.body: Consent decisions are stored with purpose, channel, and legal basis so every connected experience enforces the same policy.
points: Granular consent scopes for analytics, personalization, and marketing
Real-time consent sync to connected tools
Historical consent trail with reversible preference updates

items.title: How profile and commerce features stay secure
items.body: Sensitive profile operations are protected by contextual auth checks, token scopes, and risk-aware policy controls.
points: Step-up verification for critical user actions
Attribute-level access policies for external tools
Monitoring signals for unusual profile or purchase activity

items.title: How NoIdMe supports multi-brand operations
items.body: One shared identity fabric can serve many websites while preserving brand-specific policy and experience controls.
points: Shared user graph with tenant boundaries
Centralized governance with delegated team ownership

contact.title: Launch NoIdMe Across Your Website Portfolio
contact.description: Use this website as your information layer while operational tooling runs in dedicated apps and admin surfaces.

cookieConsent.message: We use essential cookies to keep NoIdMe secure and optional cookies to improve analytics and marketing experiences.
